title: centaurea dufourii var. humilis
intro: Centaurea dufourii var. humilis, also known as dwarf cornflower, is a low-growing perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential treatment for wound healing and skin issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and acting as a natural diuretic. Centaurea dufourii var. humilis can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to leverage its medicinal properties and harness its potential health benefits.
